entry.title: 45. Jump Game II
entry.content:
LeetCode

Approach 1: Brute Force, Time Complexity: O(2^N)

Approach 2: Greedy, Moving Forward, O(N) time and O(1) space.

entry.title: 44. Wildcard Matching
entry.content:
LeetCode

Approach 1: Brute Force -> Recursion, Time Limit Exceeded

Bottom up DP, Time complexity: O(SP) link

Top Down DP -> Recursion + Memoization link

Recursion

DP: recursion + memoization

entry.title: 42. Trapping Rain Water
entry.content:
LeetCode

Approach 1: Brute force, Time complexity: O(n^2)


Approach 2: Dynamic Programming, Time complexity: O(n)

Approach 3: Using stacks, Time complexity: O(n)

Approach 4: Using 2 pointers, Time complexity: O(n), Space complexity: O(1)

entry.title: 34. Find First and Last Position of Element in Sorted Array
entry.content:
LeetCode

Binary Search + Linear Search, Time Complexity: O(N)

Binary Search on left and right branch, Time Complexity: O(logN)

entry.title: 32. Longest Valid Parentheses
entry.content:
LeetCode

Approach 1: Brute Force, Time complexity: O(n^3)


Approach 2:Dynamic Programming, Time complexity: O(n)

Approach 3: Using Stack, Time complexity: O(n)

Approach 4: Without extra space, Time complexity: O(n), Space complexity: O(1)
